'''pozagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivoried|ivoried]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivoried|ivoried]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pozagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || pozagithi || pozagiji || pozagishi || pozagiki
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || pozaguthu || pozaguju || pozagushu || pozaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || pozaguthu || pozaguju || pozagushu || pozaguku
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || pozagufthuf || pozagufjuf || pozagufshuf || pozagufkuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || pozagethe || pozageje || pozageshe || pozageke
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || pozagotho || pozagojo || pozagosho || pozagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || pozagotho || pozagojo || pozagosho || pozagoko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || pozagofthof || pozagofjof || pozagofshof || pozagofkof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pozagïfthïf || pozagïfjïf || pozagïfshïf || pozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pozagïfthïf || pozagïfjïf || pozagïfshïf || pozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pozagïfthïf || pozagïfjïf || pozagïfshïf || pozagïfkïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pozagïfthïf || pozagïfjïf || pozagïfshïf || pozagïfkïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || pozagæthæ || pozagæjæ || pozagæshæ || pozagækæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || pozagatha || pozagaja || pozagasha || pozagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || pozagatha || pozagaja || pozagasha || pozagaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || pozagafthaf || pozagafjaf || pozagafshaf || pozagafkaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || pozagasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || pozagshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || pozagroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || pozagmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || pozagyaasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopozagnkshëasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopozagnkroasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopozagnkmuasha
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopozagnkyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].none || pozazagasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || pozazagshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || pozazagroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || pozazagmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || pozazagyaasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopozazagnkshëasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopozazagnkroasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopozazagnkmuasha
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopozazagnkyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].none || pezægasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || pezægshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || pezægroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || pezægmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || pezægyaasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopezægnkshëasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopezægnkroasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopezægnkmuasha
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopezægnkyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].none || pozfagasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || pozfagshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || pozfagroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || pozfagmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || pozfagyaasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || gopozfagnkshëasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || gopozfagnkroasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || gopozfagnkmuasha
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || gopozfagnkyaasha
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
